prompt_en: Say: "This document is merely a draft, not the final version."
expected_es: Este documento es solo un borrador, no la versión final.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used here to classify the document's nature or identity (it 'is' a draft).

prompt_en: Say: "These roof tiles are from a very old, traditional factory."
expected_es: Estas tejas son de una fábrica muy antigua y tradicional.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used with 'de' to indicate origin or source.

prompt_en: Say: "The company's policy on remote work is very flexible."
expected_es: La política de teletrabajo de la empresa es muy flexible.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe an inherent or defining characteristic of the policy.

prompt_en: Say: "The meeting to design the evaluation rubric is tomorrow morning."
expected_es: La reunión para diseñar la rúbrica de evaluación es mañana por la mañana.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to indicate the time or date of an event.

prompt_en: Say: "The new seat belts are made of a highly resistant material."
expected_es: Los nuevos cinturones de seguridad son de un material muy resistente.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used with 'de' to indicate the material something is made of.

prompt_en: Say: "Our organization is officially a non-profit entity dedicated to education."
expected_es: Nuestra organización es oficialmente una entidad sin ánimo de lucro dedicada a la educación.
target_vocabulary: la entidad sin ánimo de lucro
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to define or classify the nature of the organization.

prompt_en: Say: "This significant discount is only valid for a limited time."
expected_es: Esta rebaja sustancial es válida solo por tiempo limitado.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe an inherent or defining condition of the discount (its validity).

prompt_en: Say: "The coherence of the argument is fundamental for its acceptance."
expected_es: La coherencia del argumento es fundamental para su aceptación.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to describe an essential and permanent quality of the argument.

prompt_en: Say: "The deadline for filing the objection is next Friday."
expected_es: El plazo para formalizar la impugnación es el próximo viernes.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to indicate the specific time or date of an event or deadline.

prompt_en: Say: "Our main priority is to provide excellent customer service."
expected_es: Nuestra prioridad principal es un excelente servicio al cliente.
grading_notes: Grade for SER usage: correct ser form, natural construction, agreement, prepositions, and target vocabulary/collocation.
correction_hint: SER is used to define what the main priority 'is', relating to its identity or purpose.
